name: Bump Battle Royale
author: Poki
description: Will you be the ultimate battler in Bump Battle Royale? The goal is simple: use your kart to smash opponents out of the ring. But beware! Stay sharp, or you'll find yourself flying off the edge instead. Up to 4 players can join the chaos in this thrilling party game. No tracks, no finish lines—just pure, head-to-head bumping mayhem. Only the last player standing wins. Do you have what it takes to claim victory How to play Bump Battle Royale? Player 1: Use the A key to dash! Player 2: Use the C key to dash! Player 3: Use the M key to dash! Player 4: Use the P key to dash! Who created Bump Battle Royale? Bump Battle Royale was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: The Bucket , Bad Ice-Cream and Double Edged ! How can I play Bump Battle Royale for free? You can play Bump Battle Royale for free on Poki. Can I play Bump Battle Royale on mobile devices and desktop? Bump Battle Royale can be played on your computer .
